regex.name: makelist
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client,control import re if not control.infoLabel('Container.PluginName') == 'plugin.video.thecrew': return r = re.findall('(?s)<a href="([^"]*)">\s*([^<]*)\n.*?<td>\s*([^<]*)\n', page_data) return r

regex.name: makelist2
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client import xbmc,xbmcgui pDialog = xbmcgui.DialogProgress() pDialog.create('[B][COLOR orchid]THE CREW SPORTS[/COLOR][/B]', 'The Crew Is Loading Your Event Please Wait....') url = client.external('[makelist.param1]') pDialog.update(65,'The Crew Is Loading Your Event Please Wait....') pDialog.close() if (pDialog.iscanceled()): return return url

regex.name: dir
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = 'https://thechains24.com/GREENHAT/iptv-homelander/Formula1debrid.txt'): from resources.lib.modules import control if not control.infoLabel('Container.PluginName') == 'plugin.video.thecrew': return from resources.lib.indexers import lists lists.indexer().get(url)

regex.name: makelist
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client,control import re if not control.infoLabel('Container.PluginName') == 'plugin.video.thecrew': return r = re.findall('(?s)<a class="card" href="([^"]*).*?le">([^<]*)', page_data) return r

regex.name: makelist2
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client import xbmc, xbmcgui, threading pDialog = xbmcgui.DialogProgress() pDialog.create('[B][COLOR orchid]THE CREW SPORTS[/COLOR][/B]', 'The Crew Is Loading Your Event Please Wait....') result = [None] done = [False] def fetch(): result[0] = client.external('https://methstreams.ms[makelist.param1]') done[0] = True t = threading.Thread(target=fetch) t.start() progress = 0 while not done[0]: if pDialog.iscanceled(): pDialog.close() return if progress < 90: progress += 2 pDialog.update(progress, 'The Crew Is Playing Your Event...') xbmc.sleep(200) if not result[0]: pDialog.update(100, 'Stream not found.') xbmc.sleep(2000) pDialog.close() return pDialog.update(100, 'Done!') xbmc.sleep(2000) pDialog.close() return result[0]

regex.name: makelist
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client,control if not control.infoLabel('Container.PluginName') == 'plugin.video.thecrew': return url = client.schedule('https://istreameast.app/f1streams2') return url

regex.name: makelist2
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client import xbmc, xbmcgui, threading pDialog = xbmcgui.DialogProgress() pDialog.create('[B][COLOR orchid]THE CREW SPORTS[/COLOR][/B]', 'The Crew Is Loading Your Event Please Wait....') result = [None] done = [False] def fetch(): result[0] = client.external('[makelist.param1]') done[0] = True t = threading.Thread(target=fetch) t.start() progress = 0 while not done[0]: if pDialog.iscanceled(): pDialog.close() return if progress < 90: progress += 2 pDialog.update(progress, 'The Crew Is Playing Your Event...') xbmc.sleep(200) if not result[0]: pDialog.update(100, 'Stream not found.') xbmc.sleep(2000) pDialog.close() return pDialog.update(100, 'Done!') xbmc.sleep(2000) pDialog.close() return result[0]

regex.name: makelist
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client,control if not control.infoLabel('Container.PluginName') == 'plugin.video.thecrew': return url = client.schedule('https://fsportshdz.club/f1streams.php') return url

regex.name: makelist2
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client import xbmc, xbmcgui, threading pDialog = xbmcgui.DialogProgress() pDialog.create('[B][COLOR orchid]THE CREW SPORTS[/COLOR][/B]', 'The Crew Is Loading Your Event Please Wait....') result = [None] done = [False] def fetch(): result[0] = client.external('https://fsportshdz.club/[makelist.param1]') done[0] = True t = threading.Thread(target=fetch) t.start() progress = 0 while not done[0]: if pDialog.iscanceled(): pDialog.close() return if progress < 90: progress += 2 pDialog.update(progress, 'The Crew Is Playing Your Event...') xbmc.sleep(200) if not result[0]: pDialog.update(100, 'Stream not found.') xbmc.sleep(2000) pDialog.close() return pDialog.update(100, 'Done!') xbmc.sleep(2000) pDialog.close() return result[0]

item.title: [COLOR orchid]¤[/COLOR] [B][COLOR white]FULL SITE LIVE[/COLOR] [COLOR orchid] (SE)[/COLOR][/B] [COLOR orchid]¤[/COLOR]

regex.name: makelist
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client,control if not control.infoLabel('Container.PluginName') == 'plugin.video.thecrew': return url = client.schedule('https://istreameast.app') return url

regex.name: makelist2
regex.expres: #$pyFunction def GetLSProData(page_data,Cookie_Jar,m,url = ''): from resources.lib.modules import client import xbmc, xbmcgui, threading pDialog = xbmcgui.DialogProgress() pDialog.create('[B][COLOR orchid]THE CREW SPORTS[/COLOR][/B]', 'The Crew Is Loading Your Event Please Wait....') result = [None] done = [False] def fetch(): result[0] = client.external('[makelist.param1]') done[0] = True t = threading.Thread(target=fetch) t.start() progress = 0 while not done[0]: if pDialog.iscanceled(): pDialog.close() return if progress < 90: progress += 2 pDialog.update(progress, 'The Crew Is Finding Your Event...') xbmc.sleep(200) if not result[0]: pDialog.update(100, 'Stream not found.') xbmc.sleep(2000) pDialog.close() return pDialog.update(100, 'The Crew Is Playing Your Event!') xbmc.sleep(2000) pDialog.close() return result[0]
